name: Quick Rich Chocolate Fudge
recipeIngredient: Hersheys chocolate bar, broken in pieces (7 oz)
Evaporated milk (2 2/3 cups, from a 13 oz can)
Marshmallow creme (2 2/3 cups, from a 7 oz jar)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate chips and Hersheys chocolate bar in a large bowl. Set aside.
2. In a heavy 4-quart saucepan, combine evaporated milk, marshmallow creme, sugar, and butter.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a full rolling boil (even bubbles on top).
4. Boil and stir for 8 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and immediately add to the chocolate in another mixing bowl. Beat until completely melted.
6. Blend in vanilla extract and nuts.
7. Pour the mixture into a buttered 9-inch square or 13 x 9 x 2 pan.
8. Cool.
